#  Complete Owner Invoices with DocuSignยฎ 
##  Background 
After your team creates an owner invoice, Procore users with a DocuSignยฎ account can prepare a DocuSignยฎ envelope for the invoice to send to the appropriate recipient(s) to request a signature.
If you are the recipient of a signature request, you do not need a DocuSignยฎ account. However, if you do have a DocuSignยฎ account and the email address matches the email you use in Procore, a copy of any documents you sign will be saved in your DocuSignยฎ account. After all of the required signatures are collected in DocuSignยฎ, Procore changes the status of the commitment to **Approved**.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's **Prime Contracts** tool
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Once you log into your DocuSignยฎ account from Procore, you will NOT need to sign in again until the login token expires. Once expired, the **Re-Authentication Required** banner appears in Procore. To learn more, see [What do the different DocuSignยฎ banners in Procore mean?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-do-the-different-docusign-banners-in-procore-mean)
    * To complete the steps below, the invoice must be in _Approved_ , _Approved as Noted_ , or _Pending Owner Approval_ status.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Enable the DocuSignยฎ Integration on Your Company's Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/enable-the-docusign-integration-on-your-companys-procore-account)
  * [Enable the DocuSignยฎ Integration on a Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-the-docusign-integration-on-a-procore-project)
  * To request signatures using the Procore + DocuSignยฎ integration, you must have an active DocuSignยฎ account. You do NOT need a DocuSignยฎ account to sign a document. For details, see:
    * [Do I need a DocuSignยฉ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-do-i-need-a-docusign-account)
    * [How do I get a DocuSignยฎ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-get-a-docusign-account)
  * [Create Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-owner-invoices)


##  Steps 
  * Open the Owner Invoice
  * Log in to DocuSignยฎ
  * Prepare the DocuSignยฎ Envelope


### Open the Owner Invoice
There are two ways to open an owner invoice:
  * From the **Prime Contracts** Tool
  * From the **Invoicing** Tool


#### From the Prime Contracts Tool
  1. Navigate to the project's **Prime Contracts** tool.
  2. Locate prime contract associated with the owner invoice. Then click its **Number** link.
  3. Click the **Invoices** tab.
  4. In the **Invoices (Payment Applications)** table, click the **Invoice #** link.
  5. In the invoice, click the **Edit** button.
  6. In the **Summary** tab, click the **Update & Set Up DocuSign** button.   
![Update Set Up Docusign Button](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/bda41300852a00443e6bd181dc3c150c/e166eed734222d48faeab29a2c947d19/update-set-up-docusign-button.png?fm=webp)


#### From the Invoicing Tool
If you have 'Admin' level permission on the **Prime Contracts** tool, you can also use the project's Invoicing tool to send invoices to DocuSignยฎ in bulk.
  1. Navigate to the project's **Invoicing** tool.
  2. Click the **Owner** tab.
  3. Locate the invoice in the table. Then
  4. , click the **Invoice #** link.
  5. In the invoice, click the **Edit** button.
  6. In the **Summary** tab, click the **Update & Set Up DocuSign** button.   
![Update Set Up Docusign Button](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/bda41300852a00443e6bd181dc3c150c/e166eed734222d48faeab29a2c947d19/update-set-up-docusign-button.png?fm=webp)


Procore launches the DocuSignยฎ application. If you are not already logged into DocuSignยฎ, you will be prompted to enter your login credentials.
### Log in to DocuSignยฎ
If you are NOT logged into your DocuSignยฎaccount when you launch the DocuSignยฎ application from Procore:
#####  Notes
  * To learn how to gain access to DocuSignยฎ from a Procore tool, see one of the tasks in [Which Procore project tools support the DocuSignยฎ integration?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-project-tools-support-the-docusign-integration)
  * To log into DocuSignยฎ from Procore, you need valid login credentials (an email address and a password) for a DocuSignยฎ account. To learn more, see [Do I need a DocuSignยฉ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-do-i-need-a-docusign-account) and [How do I get a DocuSignยฎ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-get-a-docusign-account)


  1. At the DocuSignยฎ Log In page, type your email address in the **Email** box:  
![Docusign Login Email](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8197fff7b76f21fd079c5e7f6ca18897/aa375358c91f833f882e07e3d4385265/docusign-login-email.png?fm=webp)  

  2. Click **Next**.
  3. Enter your password.
  4. Click **Log In**.


### Prepare the DocuSignยฎ Envelope
Once you are logged into the DocuSignยฎ, the**Upload a Document and Add Envelope Recipient** page appears. Complete these steps:
  * Add Documents to the Envelope
  * Add Recipients to the Envelope
  * Add a Message to All Recipients
  * Add the Signature Fields & Send the Envelope


#### Add Documents to the Envelope
The following Procore information automatically populates the DocuSignยฎ envelope:
  * A PDF copy of the invoice is automatically added to the **Add Documents to Envelope** section.


You have the option to add other documents as follows:
  1. _Optional:_ If you want to add additional documents to the envelope, choose one of the available options under the 'Add Documents to the Envelope' section:  
![Owner Invoice Add Documents](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/19eb929fbefd1d6d7bfc9de1b65faa9a/fd2732913cdb65bf0f4f466baddf7400/owner-invoice-add-documents.png?fm=webp)
#####  Note
The available options in the 'Add Documents to the Envelope' section are developed and maintained by DocuSignยฎ. To learn how to use DocuSignยฎ, Procore recommends reviewing the content on [support.docusign.com](https://support.docusign.com/).
    1. **Upload**
    2. **Use a Template**
    3. **Get From Cloud**


#### Add Recipients to the Envelope
To add recipients to the envelope:
  1. Under **Add Recipients to the Envelope** , keep the default recipient blocks, their names, and their email addresses. For owner invoices, you will typically add two (2) recipients as follows:
     * **Recipient 1.** In the **Name** box, type the name of the person at your company who is responsible for signing the payment applications. If a matching user exists in the Procore Project Directory, that user's name appears as a selection in the drop-down list and the Procore + DocuSignยฎ integration completes the email address on file. If the person is NOT in the Project Directory, you can type the email address here.
     * **Recipient 2.** In the **Name** box, type the name of the architect who is responsible for certifying the payment application with a signature. Typically, this is the architect or engineer on the project. If a matching user exists in the Procore Project Directory, that user's name appears as a selection in the drop-down list and the Procore + DocuSignยฎ integration completes the email address on file. If the person is NOT in the Project Directory, you can type the email address here.   
![Owner Invoice Add Recipients](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d2a51f9542ed09d4769a36b237a2599c/851f1769cfcf156d3b28be41d310bf57/owner-invoice-add-recipients.png?fm=webp)


#####  Tip
**Want to add, change, or remove recipients DocuSign ยฎ?** The options in the 'Add Recipients to the Envelope' section are developed and maintained by DocuSignยฎ. If you change the recipient information in DocuSignยฎ, keep in mind that any changes made in DocuSignยฎ do NOT update in Procore and can lead to unwanted results. To ensure the integration works as designed, Procore recommends keeping any recipient fields that may have been added to DocuSignยฎ by Procore. To learn how to use DocuSignยฎ, Procore recommends reviewing the content on [support.docusign.com](https://support.docusign.com/).
#### Add a Message to All Recipients
  1. In the **Message to All Recipients** section, do the following:
     * **Email Subject  
** Enter a subject line for the outgoing email message.
     * **Email Message  
** Enter the copy for the body of the outgoing email message.
  2. Click **Next**.


#### Add the Signature Fields & Send the Envelope
The next step is to preview the signature fields on the PDF. The signature fields correspond to the roles in Procore. For example, the _Contractor_ and _Architect_ who are parties to the contract with the invoice. These fields are automatically added to the DocuSignยฎ envelope by the Procore + DocuSignยฎ integration.
  1. Locate the **Contractor** signature field in the invoice.
  2. Under Standard Fields, use a drag-and-drop operation to move the Signature field to the signature line in the contract. In the right pane under Signature, make sure the appropriate Recipient is selected as pictured below.   
![Owner Invoice Add Signature Field](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d20c1a669d0155160da0f3b855529584/40c51df3446b1fad0aa4db8ef6ee0f53/owner-invoice-add-signature-field.png?fm=webp)  

  3. Repeat the step above to add the signature field for the 'Archictect/Engineer' on the project.
  4. _Optional:_ Add any additional 'Standard Fields' to the PDF form as desired. 
#####  Note
The options in the 'Standard Fields' area are developed and maintained by DocuSignยฎ. To learn how to use DocuSignยฎ, Procore recommends reviewing the content on [support.docusign.com](https://support.docusign.com/).
  5. _Optional:_ To preview the envelope as a recipient, click **Preview**. The click the close (x) icon in the top right corner to close the preview.
  6. When you are ready send the envelope out for signature, click **Send**.   
DocuSignยฎ sends the envelope to the specified recipients. Recipients can then continue with the Next Step. After all signatures are collected and applied to the document in DocuSignยฎ, you will need to manually change the status of the invoice to 'Approved' in Procore.


##  Next Step 
  * [Sign a Procore Document with DocuSignยฎ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/sign-with-docusign)


## See Also
  * [About Owner Invoices (Beta)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/about-owner-invoices)
  * [What are the DocuSignยฎ fields and can I customize them?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-docusign-fields-and-can-i-customize-them)
  * [Create Prime Contract Change Orders (Beta)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-prime-contract-change-orders)
title: Complete Owner Invoices with DocuSignยฎ
description: How to complete an owner invoice using the DocuSign integration.
